--------

Instead jumping, you change the gravity; instead confront enemies, avoid them. This is the premise of VVVVVV, a simple game, but very fun! The colored graphics, like a Commodore 64 game, is nice and can bring a sense of nostalgia for those who played these old games. The soundtrack is spectacular, an agradable 8-bit sound for the ears.

In the main game itself is not large, perhaps, as were the classic side action games, however, it will spend a few more hours if you are hunting achievements. This can be the negative criticism for some players, they are almost impossible - if you are patient, a bit of training and soon you can, because has a pattern for beat the levels.

The controller compatibility works very well, in my case, I used a Xbox 360 controller.
I want the $0 I paid for this back.

Despite being such a sharp departure from what came before, Fallout 4 succeeds in being an incredible game, one that will stick with me for my life. 

Also talk to the lady in the red dress in Goodneighbour and keep passing the charisma checks, trust me.
stressful game. has its good and bad moments. really have to be in the mood though or its just annoying.
this game is very bloodborne-like and i honestly see no difference between the two and i enjoy every minute of it
